titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of BL Add. Ch. 76696

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=80 status=live modified=2021-04-04 14:25:36.268958+00 | translation moa=79 status=live modified=2021-04-04 14:25:33.248029+00

div.p:
W. Rex Scottorum Omnibus probis hominibus tocius terre sue presentibus et futuris salutem. Sciatis me dedisse
et concessisse Orm filio Hugonis Inueraricthin per suas rectas diuisas Tenend’ sibi et heredibus
suis de me et heredibus meis in feudo et hereditate libere et quiete saluo mihi seruicio meo
quod ad terram illam pertinet . precipio etiam firmiter ut ubicumque inuenerit natiuos homines et fugitiuos
ad terram illam pertinentes eos iuste habeat . et prohibeo firmiter ne quis ei quemquam ex illis iniuste
detineat super meam defensionem. Testibus . Nic’ cancellario . Comite Waldeuo . Waltero filio
Alani dapifero . Nesso filio Willelmi . Ricardo Cumin . Gileberto filio Richerii . Willelmo de Haia . Wal
tero de Berkelai . apud Forfar.

William, king of the Scots, to all worthy men of his enitre land, present and future, greeting. Know that I have given and conceded Inverarity to Orm son of Hugh by its correct boundaries, for him and his heirs to hold of me and my heirs in feu and heritage, freely and quitly, saving to me my service that pertains to that land. I also strictly enjoin that wherever he may find neyfs and fugitives beloning to that land he may justly have them, and I strictly forbid that anyone should unjustly withhold any of these from him, upon my prohibition. As witnesses: Nicholas the chancellor; Earl Waldef; Walter son of Alan, the steward; Ness son of Williaml; Richard Comyn; Gilbert son of Richer; William de la Haye; Walter Berkeley. At Forfar.
